groupDefinition.name: General
groupDefinition.description: Miscellaneous cross-cutting tasks, documentation, and foundational CI/CD workflows.

items.title: Migrate Work-Item Data Files to Group-Definition Schema
items.description: Restructure all 11 work-item JSON files from plain arrays to objects containing groupDefinition and items fields.
details: Migrate all 11 files in docs/data/work-items/ from plain JSON array to object structure: { groupDefinition: { name, color: { fill, stroke }, description }, items: [...] }
groupDefinition.name must exactly match the featureGroup string used in all items within that file
groupDefinition.color values are sourced from the existing FEATURE_COLORS map in generate-docs.js
groupDefinition.description must be a concise one-sentence boundary statement for the group
[Test] Verify each migrated file parses as valid JSON
[Test] Verify groupDefinition.name matches every item's featureGroup field within the same file
[Test] Verify no item's featureGroup references a group not defined in any file's groupDefinition

items.title: Update Scripts for Group-Definition Schema
items.description: Update generate-docs.js and manage-wi.js to consume the new groupDefinition structure and enforce group validation.
details: Update loadAllItems() in generate-docs.js to read items from file.items instead of the root array
Build FEATURE_COLORS dynamically from each file's groupDefinition.color — remove the hardcoded constant
Update manage-wi.js add to validate featureGroup against all groupDefinition.name values across data files; emit error and exit non-zero if no match found

Update manage-wi.js add to accept a new create-group subflow: when adding a WI to a non-existent group, require explicit --new-group flag with --fill, --stroke, and --group-desc arguments to create the groupDefinition entry
[Test] Verify generate-docs.js backlog output is identical before and after migration when data is equivalent
[Test] Verify manage-wi.js add exits with non-zero code when featureGroup does not match any groupDefinition.name
[Test] Verify manage-wi.js add succeeds and writes groupDefinition when --new-group flag is provided with all required arguments

items.title: Update Documentation for Group-Definition Schema
items.description: Update data-management-spec.md and project-management.md to reflect the new groupDefinition structure as the canonical Feature Group registry.
details: Update data-management-spec.md §2 Work Item Schema: add groupDefinition block to the file-level schema; update featureGroup field description to state it must match groupDefinition.name in the same file
Update data-management-spec.md §4.1 manage-wi.js behavior table: document --new-group flag and group validation error behavior
Update project-management.md §1.4 Feature Groups: replace reference to FEATURE_COLORS with reference to groupDefinition in each work-item JSON file
[Test] Verify all internal cross-references between updated docs resolve to existing anchors

items.title: Enrich manage-wi.js show & Update Governance Doc
items.description: Extend 'show' command to include dependency statuses and update the data governance reference.
details: Modify scripts/manage-wi.js cmdShow to provide _dependencyStatuses
Update .agents/skills/work-item-management/references/wi-data-governance.md §4.1
[Test] Verify show output contains status for all listed dependencies

items.title: Spec: Extended WI Lifecycle
items.description: Update wi-data-governance.md to reflect new statuses and filters.
details: Update status definitions
Update view filter rules
Update timeline logic description
[Test] Verify wi-data-governance.md contains 'accepted' and 'rework' in §2.2

items.title: Logic: update-wi.js Lifecycle Update
items.description: Update the script to support the new statues and timeline completion rules.
details: Inject new validStatuses
Update timeline logic for 'accepted' and 'aborted'
[Test] Verify 'node scripts/update-wi.js WI-## accepted' updates status and completed date

items.title: Logic: generate-docs.js Rendering Engine
items.description: Update the rendering engine to handle the new lifecycle statuses in all views.
details: Update getBacklogView filter
Update getChangelogView filter
Update getRoadmapView Mermaid styling logic
[Test] Verify roadmap renders 'done' as dashed and 'rework' as red

items.title: Spec: work-item-management Skill Update
items.description: Reflect status ownership and transitions in the agent instructions.
details: Update §4 Progressing a Work Item
Add role ownership table
[Test] Verify Skill file contains 'accepted' status instructions

items.title: Enhanced Work Item Querying
items.description: Upgrade manage-wi.js to support listing by group and filtering.
details: Implement list-group <Name> subcommand
Default: single-line summary of active items only
Support --status <all
pending
...> and --detailed flags
Maintain high signal-to-noise ratio in output
Update wi-data-governance.md (§4.1) to reflect new CLI behavior
Update project-management.md references to manage-wi.js capabilities
[Test] Verify 'list-group' handles non-existent groups gracefully

items.title: Documentation Workflow Automation (Doc-Guard)
items.description: Create a unified tool for standardized doc creation and quality verification.
details: Implement doc-guard.js with 'init-spec' and 'verify' subcommands
Centralize Doc Schema definition (Frontmatter, Mandatory Sections)
Pre-populate WI context into specs
Implement CI-ready linting for the docs/ directory
[Test] Verify init-spec generates compliant files; verify script rejects malformed MDs

items.title: Workflow Integration: Doc-Guard Protocol
items.description: Integrate doc-guard.js into Specification and Review handoff processes.
details: Integrate init-spec into PA scoping: run script instead of manual MD creation
Integrate verify into LE/QCR protocol: run lint:docs before/at start of review
Update project-management.md and Agent Skills (work-item-management, review-package)
[Expected] 100% compliance with Documentation Authoring Rules (§4.3 Formatter)
[Expected] Reduce QCR format-related rejections by automating pre-checks
[Test] Verify agent SOPs correctly enforce mandatory script usage
